objective: Land AgentOps eval environment from origin/codex/eval-env-discovery (89 commits, 8b47ba14, +25,748/-266 LOC, 230 files) onto main as 3 stacked PRs gated by 3 prereq beads.
pre_mortem_fixes_applied: P1 (3): rollback section, error-rescue map, prereq-A acceptance, documentation-index.md added to PR-1. P2 (3): fresh-session rule, rebase-on-latest, error-rescue table.

waves.description: Fix prereqs in parallel + start PR-1 setup (cherry-pick foundation onto fresh branch)
PR-1 hand-merges (validate.yml, AGENTS.md, pre-push-gate pair, docs); push as draft
PR-2 cherry-pick CLI integration 6 commits + regenerate
PR-3 cherry-pick canaries+closeout 76 commits + state-file resolution + regenerate
Archive tag + delete codex/eval-env-discovery (apply f-2026-04-26-003 squash-merge-aware check + f-2026-04-26-004 archive-tag-before-delete)

contract_surfaces: git: branch off main, cherry-pick, rebase, conflict resolution, archive-tag-before-delete
beads: prereqs blocking PR-3, PR-1 blocks PR-2 blocks PR-3
done_criteria: All 3 prereqs (ag-l0w, ag-5p8, ag-aez) closed via mechanical acceptance criteria
PR-1 (ag-664) merged to main with green CI and reviewer approval
PR-2 (ag-rnb) merged to main with green CI and reviewer approval
PR-3 (ag-xsy) merged to main with green CI (>=54 suites passing) and reviewer approval
codex/eval-env-discovery branch archived (archive/codex-eval-env-discovery tag) and deleted from origin
Parent epic (ag-3lx) closed with reference to all 3 merge commits

applied_findings.how: Wave 5 uses mergeCommit-aware check, not raw git cherry
d749108b reclassified to closeout based on diff content, not commit position
PR-1 treats pre-push-gate.sh + .bats as a coupled hand-merge pair
Subagent claim of wave-6 bead exercise verified false via git ls-tree before incorporating into plan

risks_acknowledged: Main moves daily; rebase-on-latest required before each PR push
PR-3's 76-commit cherry-pick chain requires fresh session boundary
Standards-injector removal coupling: pre-push-gate.sh + .bats must be edited together
Codex artifacts regenerated post-rebase, never 3-way merged (ensures hash parity)
next_phase: STOP-and-confirm with user before /crank starts cherry-picking. User explicitly said Phase 2 (git surgery) needs separate confirmation.
